WITH seg_min AS (
  SELECT c.Segment, MIN(y.Consumption) AS min_cons
  FROM yearmonth y
  JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
  GROUP BY c.Segment
),
seg_lowest AS (
  SELECT c.Segment, y.Consumption
  FROM yearmonth y
  JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  JOIN seg_min sm ON c.Segment = sm.Segment AND y.Consumption = sm.min_cons
  WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
),
seg_stats AS (
  SELECT Segment,
         SUM(Consumption) AS total_cons,
         COUNT(*) AS cnt,
         SUM(Consumption)/COUNT(*) AS avg_cons
  FROM seg_lowest
  GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT
  (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_stats WHERE Segment='SME') -
  (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_stats WHERE Segment='LAM') AS SME_LAM,
  (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_stats WHERE Segment='LAM') -
  (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_stats WHERE Segment='KAM') AS LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_stats WHERE Segment='KAM') -
  (SELECT avg_cons FROM seg_stats WHERE Segment='SME') AS KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH seg_year AS (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         SUM(CASE WHEN LEFT(y.Date,4)='2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons2012,
         SUM(CASE WHEN LEFT(y.Date,4)='2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS cons2013
  FROM yearmonth y
  JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  GROUP BY c.Segment
),
perc AS (
  SELECT Segment,
         ((cons2013 - cons2012) / cons2013) * 100 AS pct_increase
  FROM seg_year
)
SELECT 'Biggest' AS type, Segment, pct_increase
FROM perc
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Lowest' AS type, Segment, pct_increase
FROM perc
ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH female AS (
  SELECT client_id, birth_date
  FROM client
  WHERE gender='F'
),
oldest_birth AS (
  SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS oldest_date
  FROM female
),
oldest_females AS (
  SELECT client_id
  FROM female
  WHERE birth_date = (SELECT oldest_date FROM oldest_birth)
),
avg_salary AS (
  SELECT CAST(link_to_member AS UNSIGNED) AS client_id, AVG(amount) AS avg_salary
  FROM income
  GROUP BY client_id
),
min_avg AS (
  SELECT MIN(avg_salary) AS min_avg
  FROM avg_salary
  WHERE client_id IN (SELECT client_id FROM oldest_females)
),
max_avg AS (
  SELECT MAX(avg_salary) AS max_avg
  FROM avg_salary
)
SELECT a.account_id AS account_number, (m.max_avg - l.min_avg) AS gap
FROM account a
JOIN avg_salary s ON a.account_id = s.client_id
JOIN min_avg l ON s.avg_salary = l.min_avg
JOIN max_avg m
WHERE a.account_id IN (SELECT client_id FROM oldest_females);	----- bird -----	financial
